name: Melt-in-Your-Mouth Potato Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the yeast cake and 2 tablespoons of warm water until dissolved.
2. Add the mashed potatoes, hot water, and sugar to the yeast mixture. Mix well.
3. Stir in 2 beaten eggs, 1/2 cup butter, and a pinch of salt until combined.
4. Gradually add 1/2 cup flour until a smooth batter forms.
5. Line a muffin tin with greased paper or parchment.
6. Fill each muffin cavity about 2/3 full with the batter.
7. Let the muffins rise for 30 minutes, then bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20 minutes.
8. Brush the tops of the muffins with melted butter and sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
Note: Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature for best results.
